'''Jordo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Telos IV]] who served as a soldier with the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]], serving alongside [[Carth Onasi]] for a time. However, while Carth stayed on with the fleet after the [[Bombing of Telos IV|devastation of Telos]], Jordo left, taking a job with [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]. [[3956 BBY|Some years later]], he informed Carth of the fate of his son, [[Dustil Onasi|Dustil]], stating that he was alive and had joined the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] as a student at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].

==Behind the scenes==
Jordo only appears if the player leaves the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' with Carth in their party, and only after having talked with Carth about his past and learning of the fate of his family.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
